title: Armorful Continued
description: Adds armor for various mobs naturally. Illagers, Witches, Drowned and more!
body:
Armorful adds armor for various mobs naturally where vanilla does not. It adds armor to illagers during raids and patrols, and allows Drowned to spawn with armor. The mod features equipment customization for Evokers, Illusioners, Pillagers, Vindicators, and Vexes, with spawn chances dependent on world difficulty and raid wave numbers. Drowned mobs similarly gain difficulty-based armor spawning mechanics.

**Note:** This is a maintained fork for MC 1.21.11, original mod by [IMB11](https://modrinth.com/user/IMB11).

![Illagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B1V2WRim/images/596fc4524849f1a570055b670163086f2055b88c.png)

![Drowned](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B1V2WRim/images/f3e8644ca64eeb0e1401f64720cd326d8ce0bf69.png)
